The Facility
ENGINEERED
FOR PERFORMANCE

Our purpose-built basement AstroTurf field isn't an afterthought — every square foot is designed to maximize your athlete's training environment. No distractions. No wasted space.

🏃

40ft Speed Runway

A dedicated full-length corridor optimized for sprint mechanics, ladder drills, and SAQ development. Athletes learn to generate, control, and redirect speed with proper technique.

40 ft × 20 ft

AstroTurf Training Field

A full indoor AstroTurf field purpose-built for ball mastery, first-touch patterns, striking sequences, and technical skill work. The turf surface replicates real match feel so skills transfer directly to game day.

Indoor AstroTurf field — 40ft × 20ft
🛡️

Controlled Environment

Climate-controlled, distraction-free, and weather-proof. Your athlete trains year-round at peak focus with direct, candid coaching that open gyms can't provide.

Indoor · Year-round
Services
WHAT WE TRAIN
Soccer Technical

Ball Mastery & Technical Skills

Methodical, repetition-driven sessions targeting the technical gaps that separate good players from great ones.

  • Ball Mastery — close control, pressure moves, foundational touches
  • First Touch — receiving under pressure, body positioning, orientation
  • Striking — driven shots, finesse, volley mechanics, striking zone
  • 1v1 Skills — cuts, turns, directional dribbling
Individual
$30
per 30-min session
Athletic Performance

SAQ & Physical Literacy

Athletic development built specifically around soccer — speed, agility, and movement quality that translate directly onto the pitch.

  • Speed — acceleration mechanics, max velocity, fly 10s
  • Agility — change of direction, reactive footwork, deceleration
  • Quickness — hand-eye, foot-eye, reaction time
  • Injury Prevention — growth-plate aware programming
Soccer
Individual
$30
per 30-min session

Coach
BRYAN LITTLE
COACH'S DNA

Pro player turned elite youth coach. Over 15 years of coaching experience from FC Bayern Munich methodology to directing club programs — now bringing that expertise to one athlete at a time in Broomfield, CO.

USSF C License USSF D License USSF E License USSF F License M.A. Education 3× Coach of the Year
Mission Statement

"Developing the next generation of technically dominant and physically resilient athletes through high-intensity, micro-environment training — where every touch, every rep, and every session is intentional."

200
THE 200-TOUCH GUARANTEE

Every soccer session at L3 Soccer Academy guarantees a minimum of 200 ball touches. That's not an estimate — it's a commitment. Traditional team training gives a player 20–40 touches per session. Here, your athlete gets 200+ in 30 minutes. That's the micro-environment advantage.

The Philosophy — Small Space, Big Gains

Elite players don't develop on big fields — they develop in tight spaces under pressure. Our 40ft × 20ft indoor turf field forces athletes to make faster decisions, execute cleaner touches, and develop sharper reactions than any full-field environment can replicate.

When space is compressed, the margin for error disappears. That's exactly the environment that builds technically dominant players. What looks like a limitation is actually the most powerful training tool in the facility.

Coaching Career
2022–2026
Broomfield Soccer Club — Youth Coach
Broomfield, CO

3× Club Coach of the Year. Leads technical and tactical development for the 2014 Prestige and 2016 boys teams. Integrates Veo camera system for match recording and individual player video analysis.

2016–2021
Westminster High School — Head Coach, Boys & Girls Soccer
Westminster, CO

Managed all phases of a competitive high school program including tryouts, conditioning, state competition preparation, and building a cohesive coaching staff culture.

The Facility
THE LAB

A private, purpose-built training environment. Not a gym. Not a field. Something better.

📸
The Turf Field
Photo coming soon
Equipment Showcase
Ball Mastery Station
Kwik Cones Jumbo

Kwik Cones Jumbo create a technical perimeter for multi-directional agility and footwork drills, forcing athletes to navigate tight spaces with balance and precision. These markers serve as essential visual cues for body control, ensuring athletes maintain proper form and spatial awareness during high-intensity movement.

Shooting Station
Bownet Goal — 9ft × 7ft

The 9×7ft Bownet goal is built for high-volume shooting drills, allowing athletes to take rapid-fire strikes that build essential muscle memory and game-speed reflexes.

Ball Inventory
Puma Premier League Balls

Our full inventory of Size 4 and Size 5 Puma Premier League match balls ensures tailored training that matches each athlete's age and technical level. No cheap training balls — your athlete trains with the real thing.

Runway Finish Station
GoSports Training Net

The explosive technical finish of our speed runway. Athletes transition from high-speed acceleration drills directly into a strike requiring extreme accuracy to hit the center target — replicating real match pressure at full speed.

Agility & Mastery Station
Flat Disc Cones

Low-profile flat disc cones provide a flush surface that prevents ball deflection and minimizes trip hazards, making them ideal for unobstructed ball mastery and high-speed agility drills.

How to add your videos
